name: xbloom-recipe-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker: authenticated recipe generation, D1 storage, bridge queue

scripts.deploy: npm run validate && npm run check:web && npm run build:web && npm run stage:web && npm run verify:web-assets && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:public-url: npm run check && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.public.toml
scripts.check:web: npm --prefix web run typecheck && npm --prefix web run lint && npm --prefix web run test
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
